phrases.intent_en: Ask to try a calisson before buying
phrases.text_local: Puis-je goûter un calisson avant d'en acheter ?
phrases.pronunciation: pwee-ZHUH goo-TAY uhn kah-lee-SOHN ah-VAHN dahn ash-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Calissons are the iconic sweet of Aix-en-Provence — almond paste and candied melon formed into an elongated diamond shape, coated with royal icing. Roy René is the most prestigious maker, with its workshop visible through a glass window in the Cours Mirabeau boutique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a gift box of calissons
phrases.text_local: Je voudrais une boîte de calissons pour offrir, s'il vous plaît.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH oon BWAT duh kah-lee-SOHN poor oh-FREER, seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: Calissons come in elegant gift boxes at Roy René, making them the quintessential souvenir from Aix. The traditional variety uses Provence melon and almonds from the local AOC, though flavoured versions (lemon, pistachio, violet) are also made.

responses.english: What size? Twelve or twenty-four pieces?
responses.phonetic: kel TYE ? dooz oo vehn-KAH-truh PYES
responses.french: Quelle taille ? Douze ou vingt-quatre pièces ?

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long calissons stay fresh
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps se conservent les calissons ?
phrases.pronunciation: kohm-BYEHN duh TAHN suh kohn-SEHRV lay kah-lee-SOHN
phrases.cultural_note: Calissons are vacuum-packed for freshness and keep for several months, making them practical gifts for travellers.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they can ship internationally
phrases.text_local: Est-il possible d'envoyer une commande à l'étranger ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL poh-SEE-bluh dahn-vwah-YAY oon koh-MAHND ah lay-trahn-ZHAY
phrases.cultural_note: Roy René ships internationally and also sells online. The calissons are vacuum-packed for freshness and will keep for several months, making them practical gifts for travellers heading home.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what makes a genuine Aix calisson different from imitations
phrases.text_local: En quoi le vrai calisson d'Aix se distingue-t-il des imitations ?
phrases.pronunciation: ahn KWAH luh VREH kah-lee-SOHN DEX suh dees-TEHN-gwuh TEEL dayz ee-mee-tah-SYOHN
phrases.cultural_note: Authentic Calisson d'Aix must contain a minimum of 35% Provence almonds and candied Provence melon, be produced in the Aix-en-Provence area, and carry the IGP (Indication Géographique Protégée) label. Generic calissons sold in supermarkets often use inferior ingredients.

responses.english: Look for the IGP label on the packaging.
responses.phonetic: shehr-SHAY luh lah-BEL ee-zhay-PAY soor lahm-bah-LAHZH
responses.french: Cherchez le label IGP sur l'emballage.
